purpose: Track P0 reviewer outreach and feedback without storing personal contact details, raw PR evidence, or private customer data.

outreachSlots.nextAction: Send the 10-minute public PR path and ask for one public or shareable PR session.
Ask for one public or shareable AI-agent PR with visible task or issue context.
Offer a live walkthrough or async report review focused on inspection priority.

limitations: No outreach has been recorded as sent in this fixture.
Reviewer usefulness remains unclear until at least one real reviewer uses AgentProof on a real PR.
Internal-only review must be marked biased and insufficient and cannot prove real-user validation.
